proof:
have h₀' : (5 * n) % 17 = 8 := h₀
  have h₁ : (7 * ((5 * n) % 17)) % 17 = (7 * 8) % 17 := by
    simpa [h₀']
  have h₂ : (7 * ((5 * n) % 17)) % 17 = (7 * (5 * n)) % 17 := by
    simp [Nat.mul_mod]
  have h₃ : (7 * (5 * n)) % 17 = n % 17 := by
    have : (7 * 5) % 17 = 1 := by decide
    simpa [Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_mod, this]
  have h₄ : n % 17 = (7 * 8) % 17 := by
    have : (7 * 8) % 17 = (7 * ((5 * n) % 17)) % 17 := by
      simpa [h₁] using (congrArg (fun t => (7 * t) % 17) h₀')
    have : (7 * 8) % 17 = n % 17 := by
      calc
        (7 * 8) % 17 = (7 * ((5 * n) % 17)) % 17 := by
          simpa [h₁] using (congrArg (fun t => (7 * t) % 17) h₀')
        _ = (7 * (5 * n)) % 17 := by simpa [h₂]
        _ = n % 17 := by simpa [h₃]
    exact this.symm
  simpa using h₄
